title: Imagery medium, rights, representation, and crops are intentional
summary: Photo, illustration, diagrams, and synthetic media have distinct jobs and governed metadata.
guidance: Choose imagery from communication intent and require rights, consent, focal point, crop, accessibility, and synthetic-media provenance.
do: Preview every target crop around meaning-critical regions
dont: Stage authenticity or infer identity from appearance
Publish synthetic media without required disclosure
verification: Rights gate, representation review, crop matrix, alt-text review, and expiry check
